message:
fix: Eliminate duplicate struct member errors for class attributes

Fix 35: In genClassAttributeFields, skip .constant and .name values
since they are already handled as `pub const` in generators.zig.
This prevents duplicate struct member errors like 'ROUND_FLOOR'.

Fix 38: Use scoped labels in time_mod.zig to prevent duplicate
label 'blk' errors when time functions are nested in other blocks.
- genNsToSec uses time_{id}: instead of blk:
- genGmtime uses gmtime_{id}: instead of blk:

Tested: All 8 core tests pass (bool, float, unary, int_literal,
longexp, binop, complex, tuple).
